| 
This pressure sprayer is fitted with a polypropylene head with a patented device that blocks the lever in a continuous spray position.

The nozzle is adjustable from fine mist to straight jet (that goes up to 7 m maximum length) while tanks are made of a special chemical-resistant material.

The sprayer bottle is embossed with graduated scale in ml & dilution scale in %. Dip tube is made in EVA (Ethylene-vinyl acetate).

It has a 360 system dip tube.

The cylinder is made of stainless steel Aisi.
